howItWorks.intro: This rifle scope moa calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: MOA Adjustment
rules.explanation: Inches of drop divided by inches-per-MOA at that distance.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: Minute of Angle — 1 MOA ≈ 1.047 inches at 100 yards, scaling with distance.
MOA is finer adjustment (1/4 MOA clicks), MRAD uses metric-friendly 0.1 mrad clicks.
